name: Lonkey Industrial Co.,Ltd.Guangzhou
summary: Lonkey Industrial Co.,Ltd.Guangzhou manufactures and sells detergents in China. The company offers washing powders, liquid detergents, soaps, fabric and homecare cleaning products, and personal care products. It offers its products under Langqi, Gaofuli, Tianli, Renaissance, Weikeyi, Kuan'an, and Jiannengjing brands. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
